low_poly.image_prompt_suffix: clean low poly game asset, simplified geometry, readable silhouette, chunky forms, limited fine detail, consistent stylized materials

highly_detailed.image_prompt_suffix: highly detailed asset with rich surface detail, intricate material breakup, refined forms, premium hero-asset presentation

photorealistic.image_prompt_suffix: photorealistic asset, realistic proportions, realistic materials, realistic lighting response, production-grade surface realism

stylized.image_prompt_suffix: stylized 3D asset with strong shape language, cohesive exaggerated forms, polished game-art readability

toon.image_prompt_suffix: toon-styled 3D asset, bold readable shapes, simplified shading, animation-friendly silhouette

voxel.image_prompt_suffix: voxel-inspired blocky asset, cubic forms, simple color breakup, readable silhouette
